tools.name: ask_financial_rag
tools.description:
Answer one-company financial questions with verified, traceable RAG evidence.

Put the company name or ticker and period in `query`. `co_code` is an optional
backwards-compatible hint, not a replacement for an explicit company in the query.
A `refused` status means the caller must not invent or supplement an answer.

tools.name: retrieve_financial_evidence
tools.description: Retrieve validated financial evidence without generating an answer.

tools.name: ask_earnings_call
tools.description: Answer one-company earnings-call questions using transcript evidence only.

tools.name: list_earnings_calls
tools.description: List available calls so an agent never guesses what recent quarters means.

tools.name: retrieve_multi_period_earnings_call_evidence
tools.description: Retrieve separately grouped evidence for up to four earnings-call quarters.

tools.name: get_earnings_call_transcript
tools.description: Read the latest or specified earnings call as ordered speaker conversations.

tools.name: retrieve_earnings_call_evidence
tools.description: Retrieve validated transcript evidence without generating an answer.

tools.name: retrieve_earnings_call_blocks
tools.description: Retrieve transcript blocks with nested, attribution-preserving content objects.
